label: Minimal style — strip group colors and match Zen's address-bar styling
Strict rule enforcement — eject tabs from a group when their hostname isn't in that group's rule

options.label: Ollama — Stronger model, requires Ollama running locally

label: When AI assigns a tab to an existing group

options.label: Always-add — Append the tab's domain to the matched rule (rules grow)
Transient — Move the tab only, rules untouched

label: When AI creates a new group

options.label: Auto-add — Create the group and save it as a new rule
Transient — Create the group only, no rule added
Prompt — Open Zen's edit modal to confirm name and color
Fresh categories — Re-tidy ALL tabs into AI-invented groups, ignoring rules
Plan Mode — Preview the AI's plan, pick which groups to keep, optionally re-assign

label: Keep Ollama model warm — preloads at browser start and keeps it loaded between clicks (faster tidy clicks; uses VRAM continuously)
